message:
feat(ftui): undo/redo for query + filter editing (2noh9.4.11)

Snapshot-based UndoHistory with push/pop undo/redo stacks (max depth 100).
Ctrl+Z undoes, Ctrl+Shift+Z redoes. Covers: query clear/word-delete,
all filter changes, time preset, source filter, grouping, saved view loads.
11 new tests covering stack mechanics + msg-level roundtrips.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
